news.headline: North Korea Tests New Weapons, Drawing Lessons from Iran War
news.summary: The country has been leveraging armed conflicts abroad, such as Russia’s war against Ukraine, to bolster its own military capabilities.

news.headline: Argentina MPs approve bill allowing mining in glaciers
news.summary: Thousands of people have demonstrated against the bill, which scientists and activists say threatens water resources.
